executive_summary: Latest updates from 4 sources covering the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Monitoring 4 key developments. AI analysis refreshing shortly.
execSummaryRich: Escalation: HIGH. Key developments: Washington's proposal to Iran outlines nuclear rollback, US media says. Trump says 'this war has been won' as Iran denies any agreement. Iran-Israel war LIVE: Fire at Kuwait airport after drones hit fuel tank. 'They cannot have a nuclear weapon': US pushes 15-point plan to end Iran war; se. Situation remains active.

key_developments.headline: Washington's proposal to Iran outlines nuclear rollback, US media says
key_developments.detail: US media outlets, citing unnamed officials, reported that Washington has sent a 15-point plan to Iran aimed at ending the war. key_developments.headline: Trump says 'this war has been won' as Iran denies any agreement
key_developments.detail: US President Donald Trump said “this war has been won,” claiming a joint US-Israel campaign against Iran had eliminated key leaders and secured commitments from Tehran to never seek a nuclear weapon. terminology_explained.simple_explanation: Iran's elite Revolutionary Guard — controls missiles and drones.
Narrow waterway — 20% of world oil passes through it.

what_to_watch_next: Monitor live feeds for breaking developments.

india_impact.headline: India Monitors Gulf Conflict
india_impact.detail: India's energy security tied to Gulf stability.
india_impact.full_detail: India imports 85% of crude oil from Gulf. Strait of Hormuz disruption would immediately impact supply.

indiaSummary: India continues to monitor the US-Israel-Iran conflict closely given its significant dependence on Gulf energy imports and the large Indian diaspora. Oil price volatility directly impacts petrol prices for Indian consumers.
